_comment: Written by scripts/regen-src-golden.mjs (#91). `sha256` must match tests/fixtures/src-bundle.golden.js — tests/src-bundle-parity.test.ts enforces it, so a hand-edited golden, or one regenerated by any means that skips the reason prompt, fails the gate.
reason: #120: dom-ids net now treats turnOn/turnOff as DOM-id sinks and resolves runtime-assigned ids; that found 7 dead visibility toggles in settings-visibility.ts (6 targeting settings that no longer exist, 1 redundant) — all silent no-ops today, so deleting them is behaviour-neutral
